title: Mexican Earthy Pasta Bake
description: A hearty pasta bake with earthy flavors inspired by Mexican cuisine. This comforting dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mushrooms, cumin, and chili powder to the skillet. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the mushrooms release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to release their juices.
Stir in the cooked pasta, portuguese cheese, salt, and black pepper. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the pasta is well coated.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with additional portuguese cheese if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, until the top is golden brown and the cheese is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
